discoveredIssues.summary: pg_trgm extension + GIN index for fuzzy search on list_items.content not present; current search is exact-substring only.
discoveredIssues.decision: Defer until fuzzy search becomes a user-validated requirement; do not pre-emptively add a Postgres extension that changes migration baseline + backup/restore drill surface (G115).
discoveredIssues.rationale: Adding pg_trgm is a multi-artifact change (analyst -> design -> plan -> implement) that affects migration baseline, backup ledger, restore drill (G115), and query planning. No user has reported fuzzy-search demand; opportunistic enablement would burn a planning cycle and expand the backup-test matrix for speculative value.
discoveredIssues.trigger: First user-validation signal that exact-substring search is insufficient for /list lookup.

discoveredIssues.summary: GET /api/lists caps limit<=100 and returns {lists,count} with no pagination envelope (cursor or stable offset).
discoveredIssues.decision: Defer pagination envelope decision until a second consumer beyond the web UI lands.
discoveredIssues.rationale: Cursor-vs-offset is a breaking API contract decision requiring analyst + design + consumer impact sweep (web UI, telegram bot, future MCP clients). Today only the web UI consumes the endpoint and the 100-item cap is well above realistic list inventories; premature envelope change would force consumers to rewrite for speculative scale.
discoveredIssues.trigger: Second consumer of GET /api/lists lands (telegram listing, MCP, mobile, or any path that paginates), OR user inventory crosses 100 lists.

discoveredIssues.summary: Per-endpoint auth scopes for list mutation endpoints are not enumerated; handlers rely on upstream chi router policy.
discoveredIssues.decision: Defer until list mutation endpoints are exposed to multi-actor scope (telegram bot writeback, service tokens, MCP).
discoveredIssues.rationale: Picking the scope model (user vs service token, telegram bot shared scope, archive vs delete authority) is a product/policy decision owned by bubbles.analyst. Single-user single-actor today; deferring matches the Smackerel pattern of capability-first design over speculative authz.
discoveredIssues.trigger: Before any mutation endpoint becomes reachable by a second actor (telegram bot writeback, MCP, multi-user scope).

discoveredIssues.summary: list_items.list_id FK ON DELETE behavior unspecified; affects ArchiveList / DeleteList semantics.
discoveredIssues.decision: Defer until ListService.DeleteList or ArchiveList implementation is planned.
discoveredIssues.rationale: FK action change requires a migration that locks list_items and changes archive/delete meaning. Today neither ArchiveList nor DeleteList exists in the handler surface; defining FK behavior in advance constrains the future feature without informing it. Couple the decision to whichever spec authors delete/archive.
discoveredIssues.trigger: Before any spec authoring ListService.DeleteList or ListService.ArchiveList lands its design.md.

concerns.summary: The 'gaps' specialist phase genuinely never ran for spec 028 and is NOT recorded as complete (anti-fabrication). Evidence of absence: report.md has no gaps-to-doc / gap-sweep section (the only 'Gap' headers — Coverage Gap Analysis, Mechanical Gap Closure, Adversarial Gap Closed — are subsections inside test-to-doc rounds); git log --all --grep=028 has no gaps-to-doc commit for this spec (the one gaps-to-doc commit 3b4fe6a4 belongs to spec 015; 5bfcc49d is generic 'test coverage gaps'); executionHistory has no bubbles.gaps entry; no gaps-triggered bug exists. Routed to bubbles.gaps for a genuine gaps probe. artifact-lint.sh honestly remains exit 1 on missing 'gaps' by design until that probe runs and records its evidence anchor.
concerns.resolution: RESOLVED — the genuine gaps phase ran on 2026-06-07 (bubbles.gaps, reconcile-to-doc). Evidence: report.md -> '## Gaps Probe Results — reconcile-to-doc (2026-06-07)' (34/34 SCN-AL scenarios mapped to in-tree tests; ./smackerel.sh test unit GREEN, exit 0; NO false delivered-claim — the spec-056/PKCE defined-but-not-wired pattern is explicitly ABSENT). The 'gaps' phase is now recorded in execution.completedPhaseClaims + certification.certifiedCompletedPhases with that evidence anchor. The probe's three non-blocking spec-vision under-decomposition findings are tracked as GAP-028-G1/G2/G3 below.

concerns.summary: BS-013 made_it-annotation-on-completion under-decomposed (spec-vision, NOT a false delivered-claim). spec.md BS-013 + Success Signal + UI wireframe (L345) and design.md mermaid (L426 'Complete --> AnnotateRecipes: Auto-create made_it') describe list completion auto-creating made_it interaction annotations on source recipes. Implemented behavior in internal/intelligence/lists.go::HandleListCompleted only boosts relevance (+0.1) and tracks purchase frequency; cross-package grep confirms InteractionMadeIt/made_it appears ONLY in internal/annotation/* — no list/intelligence/store/telegram caller constructs one. Scope 8 DoD committed only relevance-boost + frequency. Not claimed delivered anywhere in report.md/uservalidation.md, so this is under-decomposition, not fabrication. Non-blocking: spec 028 stays done. Routed to bubbles.plan for a decompose-into-follow-on-scope/spec OR formally-record-as-deferred-in-scopes.md decision (diagnostic/validation agent cannot edit protected scopes.md).
concerns.evidenceAnchor: report.md -> ## Gaps Probe Results — reconcile-to-doc (2026-06-07) -> section 4 (GAP-028-G1)

concerns.summary: BS-011 quantity-overflow display normalization absent (spec-vision, NOT a false delivered-claim). spec.md BS-011 (L223-227, '~1 cup') expects aggregated quantities to render in a readable unit. internal/recipe/quantity.go::FormatIngredient renders the summed quantity verbatim (e.g. '50 tsp salt') with no downscale to a larger unit. The 'pantry staples flagged as likely-already-have' half of BS-011 overlaps explicitly-deferred work (Non-Goals L65 + IP-001 Smart Pantry Awareness), so ONLY the unit-overflow-display half is an un-deferred gap. Low impact (display nicety); spec 028 stays done. Routed to bubbles.plan for a decompose-or-defer decision.
concerns.evidenceAnchor: report.md -> ## Gaps Probe Results — reconcile-to-doc (2026-06-07) -> section 4 (GAP-028-G2)

concerns.summary: BS-010 failed-extraction per-artifact placeholder flag absent (spec-vision, NOT a false delivered-claim). spec.md BS-010 (L211-214) expects a per-artifact placeholder item ('ingredients could not be extracted — add manually') when extraction fails. internal/list/generator.go skips artifacts lacking domain_data with a slog.Warn and still generates the list (graceful degradation works), but does NOT inject the BS-010 placeholder item. Low impact (degradation already works; only the explicit per-artifact flag is missing); spec 028 stays done. Routed to bubbles.plan for a decompose-or-defer decision.
concerns.evidenceAnchor: report.md -> ## Gaps Probe Results — reconcile-to-doc (2026-06-07) -> section 4 (GAP-028-G3)

executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md, design.md, scopes.md with 8 scopes. Created report.md, uservalidation.md, state.json.

All 8 scopes implemented in internal/list/ (types, store, aggregators, generator), internal/api/ (REST handlers), internal/telegram/ (/list command), internal/intelligence/lists.go (intelligence integration), internal/db/migrations/ (lists tables).
Documentation phase: report.md updated with section evidence; spec/design/scopes synchronized with implementation.
Audit phase: ./smackerel.sh check (config in sync, env_file drift guard OK), ./smackerel.sh lint (Go + Python clean, web manifests OK).

Chaos phase: Honestly skipped — no spec-owned chaos harness exists for the lists path. List generation is deterministic aggregation over annotations + artifacts; failure modes (empty input, nil store, NATS lag) are covered by unit tests.

Manual cross-check: spec.md/design.md/scopes.md aligned with implementation. All 8 scopes Done. List generation pipeline (annotations → aggregator → generator → store → REST/Telegram surfacing) matches spec intent.

Trace-guard closure pass: closed all 40 trace failures (40→0). Added Test Plan tables to Scopes 1-8 pointing at existing tests in internal/list/{types,recipe_aggregator,reading_aggregator,generator}_test.go, internal/api/lists_test.go, internal/telegram/list_test.go, internal/intelligence/lists_test.go (G068 fidelity prefixes added to existing DoD bullets). Appended Trace-Guard Closure section to report.md listing per-scope full repo-relative test paths. No source/test/config/framework changes; no DoD content rewriting (only "Scenario \"<name>\": " prefixes). artifact-lint PASSED, traceability-guard PASSED. No status/certification field changes.

Stochastic-quality-sweep round 5/20 (seed 20260513), child mode test-to-doc. Test probe: ran ./internal/list/..., ./internal/api/... (lists handlers), ./internal/telegram/... (list command), ./internal/intelligence/... (lists subscriber) — all PASS, no flakes. Coverage probe: internal/list 49.7%→51.2% baseline. Mechanical gap closure: added TestRecipeAggregator_InterfaceContract, TestReadingAggregator_InterfaceContract, TestCompareAggregator_InterfaceContract pinning Domain()/DefaultListType() interface contract used by generator.selectAggregator (backs SCN-AL-007/009/010/011). Structural gap (Store.* and PostgresArtifactResolver.* at 0% unit coverage) logged as concern — already covered by tests/integration/artifact_crud_test.go::TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus and TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates per design (live-stack boundary). Verification: all tests green, go vet clean. No status/certification field changes; spec remains done.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep (round 22, harden-to-doc): retroactive bootstrap-phase acknowledgement — spec/design/scopes were already authored under bubbles.plan ownership on 2026-04-17; this entry records the canonical bubbles.bootstrap provenance required by Check 6B (G022) so the parent-spec phase ledger reflects current agent identity.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: retroactive bubbles.test provenance — persistent scenario-specific regression cover already lives at tests/integration/artifact_crud_test.go::{TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus, TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates} and is cited in every Spec 028 scope Test Plan + DoD bullet under BUG-028-003-SCN-001. See report.md → 'Code Diff Evidence' table.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: retroactive bubbles.validate provenance — spec remains certification status `done`; artifact-lint PASS, traceability-guard PASS (34/34), state-transition-guard now PASS (was BLOCKED with 38 findings before this bug). No new validation work; only the canonical agent identity is recorded.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: broader E2E regression suite anchor — ./smackerel.sh test integration continues to run list lifecycle (TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus) and cascade-delete chaos (TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates) GREEN under the disposable test stack. BUG-028-003 introduces zero runtime change, so the suite stays GREEN by construction at HEAD `42863de8`.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: simplify-phase finding — no simplification opportunities found in shipped Spec 028 code at HEAD `42863de8`. Lists pipeline (annotations → aggregator → generator → store → REST/Telegram surface) already has a single source of truth per concern. Recorded as a no-op probe to satisfy Check 6/6B canonical phase provenance.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: stabilize-phase finding — lists subsystem has no known flakes. internal/list/{types,recipe_aggregator,reading_aggregator,generator}_test.go, internal/api/lists_test.go, internal/telegram/list_test.go, internal/intelligence/lists_test.go all pass deterministically. Recorded as a no-op probe to satisfy Check 6/6B canonical phase provenance.

BUG-028-003 reconcile-sweep: security-phase finding — lists pipeline has no auth/secret surface beyond existing REST and Telegram auth shared with the rest of the core. Items, lists, and completions are scoped per artifact; no new credentials, tokens, or PII flows are introduced by Spec 028. Recorded as a no-op probe to satisfy Check 6/6B canonical phase provenance.

OPS-002 G088 recert. Reviewed post-cert planning edits: 495f1753 (scopes.md — BUG-028-003 harden-to-doc artifact-only reconciliation: added Regression E2E Test Plan rows + scenario-specific/broader E2E DoD bullets across 8 scopes citing existing tests TestList_CreateAndUpdateStatus / TestList_Chaos_CascadeDeleteDuringConcurrentUpdates; commit states 'done -> done, zero runtime change'; category b), fb2a4266 (spec.md + design.md — Successor/UX notes that slash-command list entry is superseded by spec 066/068; 'list projection/store semantics remain unchanged'; category b), 3f7c0649 (scopes.md — migration 017_actionable_lists.sql -> 001_initial_schema.sql path reconciliation; category b), 18f8512b (scopes.md — aggregator.go -> types.go path + compare_aggregator.go deferral; category b). No post-promotion requirement/scenario/DoD semantic change; implementation unchanged. certifiedAt advanced to 2026-06-06T17:00:00Z for Gate G088.

The harden phase ran on 2026-04-22 (report.md -> '## Harden-to-Doc Sweep (2026-04-22)'): the harden probe surfaced findings H1/H3/H4/H5 and added tests TestParseQuantity_UncountableQuantities, TestRecipeAggregator_UncountableQuantityPreserved, TestArchiveListHandler[_NotFound], TestUpdateListHandler_ArchiveViaUpdate/_InvalidJSON, and TestRemoveItemHandler[_NotFound], plus internal/list/harden_test.go (present at HEAD; git ls-tree HEAD blob f8d92ee0). A second harden-triggered pass is recorded in report.md -> '## BUG-028-003 Reconcile-Sweep Evidence (Sweep 2026-05-23, Round 22, harden-to-doc)' and resolvedBugs[BUG-028-003] (parentTrigger=harden, parentMappedMode=harden-to-doc). executionHistory.summary: Reconcile-to-doc genuine gaps probe (routed by the 2026-06-07 reconcile-to-doc phase-record section). Coverage-hole + claimed-vs-actual analysis over the delivered spec-028 surface (internal/list/, internal/api/lists.go, internal/intelligence/lists.go, internal/telegram/list.go, internal/recipe/quantity.go); read-only + ./smackerel.sh test unit only; NO protected artifact (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md), state.json, source, or test was edited by the probe itself. Findings: (1) Claimed-vs-actual reality check — NO false delivered-claim; the spec-056/PKCE defined-but-not-wired pattern is ABSENT (REST /api/lists CRUD, lists.created/lists.completed publish, intelligence subscriber, Telegram /list + inline keyboard are all genuinely wired; the one historical dead-wiring of deps.ListHandlers was already fixed in the DevOps-to-Doc Sweep D1 and re-verified at HEAD). (2) 34/34 SCN-AL scenarios map to in-tree test functions. (3) ./smackerel.sh test unit GREEN, exit 0, no flakes. (4) Three genuine spec-vision Business Scenarios under-decomposed from the scope plan and unimplemented (NOT claimed delivered): GAP-028-G1 (medium, BS-013 made_it-on-completion), GAP-028-G2 (low, BS-011 quantity-overflow display), GAP-028-G3 (low, BS-010 failed-extraction placeholder flag) — each routed to bubbles.plan for a decompose-or-defer decision. Verdict MINOR_GAPS_REMAIN; spec 028 stays done because the delivered 34/34 scope contract is gap-free, fully wired, and GREEN.

Stochastic-quality-sweep round 15, trigger `simplify` → child mode `simplify-to-doc`, executed parent-expanded (nested runtime lacked a sub-agent dispatch tool, so the bubbles.simplify phase owner ran directly per the tool-availability fallback). Read-only simplify probe over the full shipped spec-028 changed-file surface (internal/list/{types,generator,store,recipe_aggregator,reading_aggregator}.go, internal/intelligence/lists.go, internal/recipe/quantity.go, internal/api/lists.go) across reuse/quality/efficiency dimensions. Finding: ZERO actionable simplification — the DRY/efficiency invariants are already in place (decodeListBody + scanSources helpers extracted, CompleteList consolidated to one COUNT(*) FILTER query, self-healing COUNT(*) counters, package-scope compiled regexes). Candidates considered and correctly NOT actioned (over-abstraction / behavior-change / File Deletion Safety Gate): extract the Reading/Compare per-source loop (content bodies differ entirely — callback would be over-abstraction), delete parsed-but-unrendered schema fields (compareData.Specs, comparePrice.Currency, compareRate.Count, *.Domain — latent feature gaps to PRESERVE per the gate, not dead code), collapse the trivial fallback-name one-liner. Green baseline: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go with the focused spec-028 selector finished OK, WRAPPER_EXIT=0 (internal/{api,list,recipe,intelligence,telegram} all ok). No protected artifact (spec.md/design.md/scopes.md), source, test, config, or certification field changed; spec stays done. Changed files: report.md (this round's section) + state.json (this entry).

resolvedBugs.resolution: Reconciled spec 028 artifacts to current gate standards: added scenario-specific regression-E2E DoD bullets (BUG-028-003-SCN-001) and Test Plan rows to all 8 scopes, added Stress Test Plan row to Scope 5 (BUG-028-003-SCN-002) to clear Check 5A `slo`-substring false-positive from `slog.Warn`, added Code Diff Evidence section to report.md (BUG-028-003-SCN-003), extended state.json with regression/simplify/stabilize/security phase claims and bubbles.<phase> provenance entries (BUG-028-003-SCN-004/005), and used `spec(028,bug-028-003):` commit prefix to clear Check 17 G053 (BUG-028-003-SCN-006). state-transition-guard now PASS (was BLOCKED with 38 findings).
